rest_integration_profile-put.description: Alma integrates with external systems such as vendor systems, Enterprise Resource Planning systems, catalog systems, remote storage systems, etc. using standard protocols. Integration profiles define the way an integration is being performed.

system.description: The system with which you are integrating (for informational purposes).mandatory. Possible codes are listed in 'ExternalSystemTypes' [code table](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/Working-with-the-code-tables-API).

ftp_connection.description: S/FTP connection to transfer files between Alma and the external system.

default.description: Indication whether the profile is a default profile. Default is false.

description.example: Agresso is our system for users
